Use recipe category as primary classifier for Pricing Matrix sections

Previously items were placed into Food/Merchandise/Drinks sections based
on the product_type of their ingredient sizes, ignoring the recipe's
category tag. Now the category_name is the primary classifier — if a

All 63 assignment + 9 config cache tests pass. Clippy clean.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add backup tag for SPY integration rollback point

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Coulomb long-range demo: model_coulomb.py + train_coulomb.py

Pure PyTorch (no e3nn) controlled experiment showing Kronecker spectral
coupling captures long-range A-B interactions that a local GNN cannot:

  LocalGNN:      MAE = 0.214  (≈ std(E_AB), provably blind to A-B)
  KronHamModel:  MAE = 0.076  (2.8x better, spectral coupling works)
  KronHamV2:     MAE = 1.464  (e3nn model has no charge input → fails)

Key finding: correct physical inputs (scalar charges via nn.Linear)
matter more than equivariant architecture (e3nn Embedding of atom types).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Each section shows subtotals and a general total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: Turn-Kontext, Stats-Sync, Tab-Buttons, DM-denkt + Scroll

1. Turn-Kontext (engine.js / network.js):
   - Network._currentActionPlayerName speichert den agierenden Spieler beim
     Empfang einer PLAYER_ACTION auf dem Host.
   - _getActiveDmContext() nutzt diesen Wert statt currentTurnIndex,
     damit die DM-Antwort immer den richtigen Spieler referenziert.
   - Nach interactWithAI() wird _currentActionPlayerName zurückgesetzt.

2. Stats-Sync als Client (state.js / engine.js / network.js):
   - Neuer dispatch-Typ UPGRADE_STAT mutiert Stat + statPoints korrekt.
   - upgradeStat() nutzt jetzt dispatch() statt direkter Mutation.
   - Als Client wird zusätzlich STAT_UPGRADE-Nachricht an den Host gesendet,
     der Host übernimmt dieselbe Änderung → kein Überschreiben beim Sync.
   - 3 neue Tests in tests/state.test.js.

3. Tab-Buttons (ui.js):
   - tab-party, tab-dice, tab-system, tab-journal, tab-stats zur DOM-
     Initialisierung hinzugefügt → switchTab() findet Buttons wieder.

4. DM-denkt-Anzeige (ui.js):
   - topbar-thinking-status und topbar-thinking-text zur DOM-Initialisierung
     hinzugefügt → showLoader() kann das Element ein-/ausblenden.

5. Erforderliche Proben scrollbar (index.html):
   - min-h-0 zu action-box-container hinzugefügt, damit overflow-y-auto
     im Flex-Container korrekt greift.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: update MCP SDK to 1.27.1 with Zod v4 literal extraction patch

SDK 1.27.1 has a bug in Server.setRequestHandler() where the inline
literal extraction checks `v4Def?.value` but Zod v4 stores literals as
`values: [...]` (array). The SDK's own getLiteralValue() handles both
formats correctly but isn't used in setRequestHandler().

Adds scripts/patch-sdk.mjs that runs before build to fix the extraction.
The patch is idempotent and will be a no-op once the SDK fixes the bug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs: Fix ticketing documentation against implementation audit (#115)

* docs: Fix ticketing documentation against implementation audit

Compared ticketing docs against ext-ticketing, dr-engine/general, and
legion_extension_manager implementations. Fixes bugs, adds missing
features, and removes incorrect claims.

Bug fixes:
- Remove broken D&R get_ticket_count detection example (op: extension
  does not exist as a detection operator, and YAML had duplicate keys)
- Fix create_ticket D&R example to use correct parameters (detection
  object + severity override instead of flat fields)
- Remove false claim that escalation_group is a list filter parameter
- Remove unimplemented --group-by CLI example from reports

Missing documentation added:
- ingestion_mode config (all vs tailored) with full D&R rule examples
- ingest_detection extension action for tailored mode
- sensor_id query parameter for listing tickets
- create_ticket parameter table (detection object, severity override)
- get_ticket_count parameter table (status, severity filters)
- Empty investigation ticket creation (omitting detection)
- WebSocket real-time updates endpoint (GET /api/v1/ws)
- Rate limiting (20 req/s sustained, burst of 50)
- auto_close_resolved_after_days set-to-0-to-disable note

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: Fix D&R examples to use gjson paths instead of Go templates

Code review found that the create_ticket D&R example used Go template
syntax ({{ .routing }}) which stringifies nested objects. The D&R engine
resolves bare strings as gjson paths which correctly preserves object
structure.

Also fixed get_ticket_count: literal string values like
"new,acknowledged,in_progress" can't be passed via D&R response actions
(they'd be resolved as gjson paths and silently dropped). Changed to
REST API example matching the conventions in using-extensions.md.

Fixed api.limacharlie.io domain (was incorrectly app.limacharlie.io)
and request format (form data, not JSON body).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Biotech Scanner: optimize for catalyst trading opportunities

Three changes to prioritize actionable catalyst trades:

1. Risk Score → Opportunity Score: Sweet spot is $0.5-10B MCap
   (5 pts) instead of favoring Large Caps. Mega Caps like ABBV
   ($400B) now score low because FDA catalysts barely move them.
   Low Float (10-50M shares) gets max score for explosive potential.

2. Catalyst-Volume Confirmation Bonus: When a catalyst is found
   AND RVOL >= 1.5x, score gets +4 to +10 bonus points.
   Smart Money confirming the news = much stronger signal.

3. Float scoring inverted: High Float (>200M) now gets fewer pts
   than Low Float, reflecting catalyst trading dynamics.

Expected: Mid-cap biotechs with real catalysts rank higher than
mega-cap pharma with routine pipeline news.

commit.message:
fix: g1_ctrl CycloneDDS ABI crash + video2robot missing conda envs

g1_ctrl crashed with "free(): invalid pointer" due to CycloneDDS ABI
mismatch: libddsc.so loaded from standalone build (/cyclonedds/install)
while libddscxx.so loaded from unitree_sdk2 (/opt/unitree_robotics).
Fix: remove wrong include paths from CMakeLists, replace /cyclonedds/install/lib
with /opt/unitree_robotics/lib in LD_LIBRARY_PATH.

video2robot pipeline failed with EnvironmentLocationNotFound for phmr/gmr.
Fix: clone with --recursive for submodules, create phmr + gmr conda envs.

commit.message:
fix(bento-card): replace inline quote fields with Quote componentRef (#67)

* fix(bento-card): add box-sizing border-box to content column

width: 100% + padding without box-sizing: border-box caused the content
column to be parent-width + 32px horizontal padding wide on mobile and
half-desktop cards, overflowing the card and creating a page-level
horizontal scrollbar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(bento-block): add horizontal padding to desktop inner container

Zero horizontal padding caused cards to sit edge-to-edge at tablet
viewports below the 1280px max-width. Now matches the 16px (--space-4)
horizontal padding used by mobile and all other page sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(quote): add Quote to Contensis content model registry

Quote is now used as a nested component inside BentoCard (quote
variant), so it needs its own CMS model. Adds registry entry,
REGISTRY_TO_DIR mappings in both scripts, and the generated
Quote.contensis.json. Pushed and published to Contensis.

Now that Quote has its own Contensis model, BentoCard references it
via componentRef: 'Quote' instead of duplicating quoteText, quoteName,
quoteRole, quoteAvatar inline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Backend cleanup + comprehensive edge-case hardening

Backend:
- TTS + STT: wrap Sarvam SDK calls in asyncio.wait_for(timeout=30s) via
  run_in_executor so slow/hung API calls surface as 504 instead of hanging
  the worker forever; user-friendly 504 message shown on timeout
- Both routes: extract human-readable message from verbose SDK exceptions
  using the same regex pattern (no raw stack traces exposed)
- Remove unused /translate route from main.py (translate.py kept but
  unregistered — dead code no longer reachable)

Frontend fetch timeouts (api/sarvam.ts):
- Added timeoutSignal() helper (AbortController + setTimeout)
- TTS and STT fetch calls both carry a 35s AbortSignal — slightly above the
  backend's 30s so the backend error message reaches the client cleanly

SpeakRepeat edge cases:
- Max recording duration: auto-stops MediaRecorder after 60s so user can
  never be stuck holding the mic button
- STT processing timeout: Promise.race() against a 40s reject so the
  "analysing…" spinner cannot loop forever on a Sarvam API hang
- Error state: replaced bare red text with a dismissible card containing
  a "Try again" button that clears the error and re-enables recording

ListenIdentify edge cases:
- TTS failure: replaced undismissable red text with a banner card that
  includes a "Skip →" button calling onResult(false) — user is never
  permanently blocked when audio fails to load

Audit against ai-sessions and dr-engine/general codebases found multiple
discrepancies between documentation and implementation.

Fixes:

- Add missing `definition` mode (hive://ai_agent/) for D&R rules
- Add missing `lc_uid_secret` parameter documentation
- Fix session states: pending/terminated/failed -> starting/running/ended
- Fix end reasons: remove process_crashed, add failed/ttl_expired/org_api_requested
- Fix `one_shot` default: document as `true` for D&R sessions (not `false`)
- Note `profile_name` limitation for D&R/API sessions
- Add missing profile fields to user-sessions: ttl_seconds, one_shot, environment
- Document hibernation/dormancy behavior for user sessions

commit.message:
feat(output): implement type class pattern for CLI console output (#9)

Add a complete output subsystem that separates domain logic from
presentation using a type class pattern. Machine-readable JSON goes
to stdout, human-friendly messages go to stderr.

Core components:
- JsonEncoder<A> / HumanRenderer<A> / CliOutput<A> type class interfaces
- HumanDoc intermediate AST for rich terminal rendering
- OutputTypeToken<A> and DefaultOutputRegistry for instance lookup
- OutputSession interface for command-runtime contract
- OutputRuntime that routes events by mode (human/json/json-pretty/json-lines)
- DefaultOutputPolicy for channel routing decisions
- LineOutputSink abstraction with NodeLineOutputSink implementation
- Structured CliError model with normalizeUnknownError
- FakeSink for test capture
- Helper constructors: outputType, jsonEncoder, humanRenderer, cliOutput
- Table renderer and HumanDoc-to-text renderer

62 tests covering all components.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Bs1o4y1edSLjbqj6UtCjew

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: send welcome email from hello@computerspyai.com

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add RSI cap, breakeven stop, and time stop to day trading strategy

New parameters:
- dt_max_rsi (72): skip entry if RSI already overbought — avoids buying exhausted moves
- dt_breakeven_pct (0.5%): slide stop to entry once up 0.5% — scratch losers, not losers
- dt_time_stop_candles (20): close losing trade after 20 candles — free up capital

Updated defaults for better R:R (0.75% risk / 2% reward = 2.67:1):
- dt_price_rise_pct: 2.0 → 1.5%  (catch more valid moves)
- dt_lookback_candles: 3 → 5     (cleaner signal over 5 candles)
- dt_volume_mult: 1.5 → 2.0×     (stronger volume confirmation)
- dt_trailing_stop_pct: 1.0 → 0.75%  (tighter for short timeframes)
- dt_take_profit_pct: 3.0 → 2.0%     (more achievable target)

fix: use form.put() instead of form.post() in Employee Edit

The edit form was sending POST to employees/{id} which only accepts
PUT/PATCH, causing a MethodNotAllowed exception.
